articles.title: NEW NYC SUBWAY MAP REVIVES BELOVED RETRO DESIGN
articles.summary: The MTA has released a redesigned NYC subway map inspired by Massimo Vignelli's iconic 1972 version, earning praise for its clean, retro-modern look. While some criticize its lack of geographical accuracy, design fans have celebrated its bold colors and minimalist style. The update replaces the cluttered 1979 Hertz map, with many calling it “Vignelli's revenge.”

articles.title: MIDJOURNEY RELEASES V7, ITS FIRST NEW AI IMAGE MODEL IN NEARLY A YEAR
articles.summary: Featuring personalization, improved image quality, faster rendering, and enhanced prompt understanding, Midjourney has launched V7, its first new AI image model in a year. Available in Turbo and Relax modes, V7 powers a new Draft Mode for speed and cost efficiency. Some features remain unavailable while still in the early rollout.

articles.title: ADOBE AFTER EFFECTS JUST GOT ITS BIGGEST PERFORMANCE BOOST EVER
articles.summary: After Effects has gotten its biggest performance boost ever with a new caching system for smoother playback on any computer. New 3D tools, HDR monitoring, user-requested features like animated lights, FBX model support, and improved animation controls enhance motion design and VFX capabilities.

articles.title: THE CASE AGAINST CONVERSATIONAL INTERFACES
articles.summary: Conversational interfaces like voice assistants and chatbots aren't the future of human-computer interaction, as natural language creates a data transfer bottleneck. More intuitive and direct methods, similar to gestures or shortcuts, are encouraged for efficient and effortless communication with computers.

articles.title: DON'T LET THE DRAWINGS DISTRACT YOU: AI IS NOT ABOUT THE OUTPUT
articles.summary: AI's real value lies beyond flashy outputs like art or essays. It can optimize business decisions by processing unstructured information flows. AI enables better decision-making and scalability by enhancing how organizations capture, share, and interpret information. Businesses should use AI to augment expertise, not just generate content.

articles.title: PROTOTYPING EVERYTHING
articles.summary: More than just a design step, prototyping is a mindset of exploration and learning. In this post, Charlota Blunarova demonstrates how prototypes can test ideas, spark feedback, and shape life decisions. She highlights how low-fidelity tools and curiosity help guide choices before committing to a final version, from cardboard artifacts to AI-assisted brand sprints.

articles.summary: Web SVG is a collection of excellent SVG images and resources to help you create beautiful designs.

articles.summary: Readdy helps you turn your product requirements into beautiful, professional designs in minutes.

articles.title: TURN YOUR PAGE INTO 90S GEOCITIES MASTERPIECE
articles.summary: Transform any webpage into a GeoCities-style page from the 90s with a pinch of AI.

articles.title: A HOUSE-SHAPED MASCOT IS THE FRIENDLY FACE OF HOME MAINTENANCE IN WILDISH & CO.'S LOOK FOR DING
articles.summary: Wildish & Co. developed a warm, neighborly brand identity for Ding, a home repair service, using a house-shaped mascot, vibrant colors, and friendly typography. The design aims to make home maintenance feel approachable and personal, setting Ding apart from competitors.

MASTERS OF MIDCENTURY MODERN DESIGN AND THEIR CREATIONS SPOTLIGHTED IN NEW BOOK
articles.summary: Mid-Century Modern Designers is a new book profiling 300 iconic and lesser-known figures who shaped the midcentury movement.

articles.title: BEHIND BARS AND BEYOND WALLS: DROPCITY LAUNCHES WITH A PROVOCATIVE EXHIBITION ON INCARCERATION AND DESIGN
articles.summary: Dropcity has opened with Prison Times, a provocative exhibition revealing how design shapes prison life.

articles.summary: Koto rebranded Beaconstac as Uniqode, positioning it as an enterprise-ready leader in QR technology.
